message:
fix: reduce YouTube playlist cache to 5min and fix mermaid line breaks (#5726) - Reduce Netlify CDN cache for /api/youtube/playlist from 1 hour to 5 minutes so new playlist videos appear promptly - Replace \n with
in SELF-ASSESSMENT.md mermaid diagram — mermaid requires
for line breaks in node labels, not \n Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson
